list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.description: Monitored SQL Server instance - one MSSQL datasource per instance. Type to search.

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT TOP (1) cpu = ISNULL(total_cpu_utilization, sqlserver_cpu_utilization) FROM collect.cpu_utilization_stats ORDER BY collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT TOP (1) mem = buffer_pool_mb * 100.0 / NULLIF(committed_target_memory_mb, 0) FROM collect.memory_stats ORDER BY collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT TOP (1) running = running_sessions FROM collect.session_stats ORDER BY collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT TOP (1) blocked = total_blocked_task_count FROM collect.cpu_scheduler_stats ORDER BY collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT deadlocks = ISNULL(SUM(bds.deadlock_count), 0) FROM collect.blocking_deadlock_stats AS bds WHERE bds.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bds.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT unhealthy = COUNT_BIG(DISTINCT cl.collector_name) FROM config.collection_log AS cl WHERE cl.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -5, SYSDATETIME()) AND cl.collection_status = N'ERROR';

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT si.server_name, si.sql_version, si.edition, si.cpu_count, si.physical_memory_mb, si.environment_type, si.uptime_days, sqlserver_start_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), si.sqlserver_start_time) FROM config.server_info AS si;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), cus.sample_time), sql_server = cus.sqlserver_cpu_utilization, other_processes = cus.other_process_cpu_utilization, total_cpu = ISNULL(cus.total_cpu_utilization, cus.sqlserver_cpu_utilization) FROM collect.cpu_utilization_stats AS cus WHERE cus.sample_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND cus.sample_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY cus.sample_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ms.collection_time),
    buffer_pool = ms.buffer_pool_mb,
    plan_cache = ms.plan_cache_mb,
    other = ms.other_memory_mb,
    available_os_memory = ms.available_physical_memory_mb,
    granted_memory_mb = ISNULL((
        SELECT TOP (1)
            SUM(mgs.granted_memory_mb)
        FROM collect.memory_grant_stats AS mgs
        WHERE mgs.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -5, ms.collection_time)
            AND mgs.collection_time <= DATEADD(MINUTE, 5, ms.collection_time)
        GROUP BY mgs.collection_time
        ORDER BY ABS(DATEDIFF(SECOND, mgs.collection_time, ms.collection_time)) ASC
    ), 0)
FROM collect.memory_stats AS ms
WHERE ms.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ms.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY ms.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), css.collection_time), avg_runnable_tasks = css.avg_runnable_tasks_count, blocked_tasks = css.total_blocked_task_count, queued_requests = css.total_queued_request_count FROM collect.cpu_scheduler_stats AS css WHERE css.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND css.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY css.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ss.collection_time), total = ss.total_sessions, running = ss.running_sessions, sleeping = ss.sleeping_sessions, waiting_for_memory = ss.sessions_waiting_for_memory FROM collect.session_stats AS ss WHERE ss.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ss.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY ss.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ws.collection_time),
    metric = ws.wait_type,
    value = CONVERT(float, ws.wait_time_ms_delta)
FROM collect.wait_stats AS ws
WHERE ws.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ws.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND ws.wait_time_ms_delta > 0
    AND ws.wait_type IN (
        SELECT TOP (8)
            ws2.wait_type
        FROM collect.wait_stats AS ws2
        WHERE ws2.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ws2.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        GROUP BY ws2.wait_type
        ORDER BY SUM(ws2.wait_time_ms_delta) DESC
    )
ORDER BY ws.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT tw.wait_type, wait_seconds = CONVERT(float, tw.wait_time_sec) FROM report.top_waits_last_hour AS tw ORDER BY tw.wait_time_ms DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

WITH distinct_deadlocks AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT event_date
    FROM collect.deadlocks
    WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
),
blocking_buckets AS (
    SELECT
        time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bg.event_time)), 0),
        blocking_events = COUNT_BIG(*)
    FROM collect.blocking_BlockedProcessReport AS bg
    WHERE bg.collection_time >= DATEADD(HOUR, -1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom()))) AND bg.collection_time <= DATEADD(HOUR, 1, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))) AND bg.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bg.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bg.event_time)), 0)
),
deadlock_buckets AS (
    SELECT
        time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dd.event_date)), 0),
        deadlocks = COUNT_BIG(*)
    FROM distinct_deadlocks AS dd
    GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dd.event_date)), 0)
)
SELECT
    time = COALESCE(bb.time, db.time),
    blocking_events = ISNULL(bb.blocking_events, 0),
    deadlocks = ISNULL(db.deadlocks, 0)
FROM blocking_buckets AS bb
FULL OUTER JOIN deadlock_buckets AS db
    ON bb.time = db.time
ORDER BY time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (20)
    database_name = fio.database_name,
    file_type = fio.file_type_desc,
    reads = SUM(fio.num_of_reads_delta),
    avg_read_ms = CONVERT(decimal(19,2), SUM(fio.io_stall_read_ms_delta) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(fio.num_of_reads_delta), 0)),
    writes = SUM(fio.num_of_writes_delta),
    avg_write_ms = CONVERT(decimal(19,2), SUM(fio.io_stall_write_ms_delta) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(fio.num_of_writes_delta), 0))
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
GROUP BY fio.database_name, fio.file_type_desc
ORDER BY SUM(fio.io_stall_ms_delta) DESC;

value.title: Drill down: queries +/-20min around this spike

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (50)
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), cs.event_time),
    cs.sql_server_cpu,
    cs.other_process_cpu,
    cs.total_cpu,
    cs.severity,
    window_from_ms = DATEDIFF_BIG(MILLISECOND, '19700101', DATEADD(MINUTE, -20, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), cs.event_time))),
    window_to_ms = DATEDIFF_BIG(MILLISECOND, '19700101', DATEADD(MINUTE, 20, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), cs.event_time)))
FROM report.cpu_spikes AS cs
WHERE cs.event_time >= DATEADD(HOUR, -48, SYSDATETIME())
    AND cs.sql_server_cpu >= 60
ORDER BY cs.event_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), sca.collection_time),
    sca.scheduler_count,
    sca.cpu_count,
    sca.total_current_workers_count,
    sca.max_workers_count,
    worker_utilization_percent = sca.worker_utilization_percent,
    sca.total_runnable_tasks_count,
    sca.avg_runnable_tasks_count,
    sca.total_blocked_task_count,
    avg_runnable_tasks_1h = sca.avg_runnable_tasks,
    max_runnable_tasks_1h = sca.max_runnable_tasks,
    sca.cpu_pressure_level,
    sca.recommendation
FROM report.scheduler_cpu_analysis AS sca;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    ds.sort_order,
    ds.metric_name,
    metric_value = CASE
        /* worst_query_hash is a varbinary(8) boxed in sql_variant; a plain CONVERT to
           nvarchar reinterprets the raw bytes as UTF-16 and renders garbage. */
        WHEN SQL_VARIANT_PROPERTY(ds.metric_value, 'BaseType') IN ('binary', 'varbinary')
            THEN CONVERT(nvarchar(500), CONVERT(varbinary(8), ds.metric_value), 1)
        ELSE CONVERT(nvarchar(500), ds.metric_value)
    END
FROM report.daily_summary_v2 AS ds
ORDER BY ds.sort_order;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    change_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), scc.change_time),
    scc.configuration_name,
    scc.old_value_configured,
    scc.new_value_configured,
    scc.old_value_in_use,
    scc.new_value_in_use,
    scc.requires_restart,
    scc.is_dynamic,
    scc.is_advanced,
    scc.description,
    scc.change_description
FROM report.server_configuration_changes AS scc
WHERE scc.change_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND scc.change_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY scc.change_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    change_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dcc.change_time),
    dcc.database_name,
    dcc.setting_type,
    dcc.setting_name,
    dcc.old_value,
    dcc.new_value,
    dcc.change_description
FROM report.database_configuration_changes AS dcc
WHERE dcc.change_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND dcc.change_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY dcc.change_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    ci.issue_id,
    log_date = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ci.log_date),
    ci.severity,
    ci.problem_area,
    ci.source_collector,
    ci.affected_database,
    ci.message,
    ci.investigate_query,
    ci.threshold_value,
    ci.threshold_limit,
    problem_area_url =
        CASE ci.problem_area
            WHEN N'Blocking' THEN N'/d/perfmon-blocking'
            WHEN N'Deadlocking' THEN N'/d/perfmon-blocking'
            WHEN N'Blocking and Deadlocking' THEN N'/d/perfmon-blocking'
            WHEN N'Query Store Configuration' THEN N'/d/perfmon-queries'
            WHEN N'Memory Clerk Growth' THEN N'/d/perfmon-memory'
            WHEN N'SQL Server Stability' THEN N'/d/perfmon-system-events'
            WHEN N'Database Configuration' THEN N'/d/perfmon-instance'
            WHEN N'Server Configuration' THEN N'/d/perfmon-instance'
            ELSE N'/d/perfmon-instance'
        END,
    problem_area_qs =
        CASE ci.problem_area
            WHEN N'Database Configuration' THEN N'viewPanel=22&'
            WHEN N'Server Configuration' THEN N'viewPanel=21&'
            ELSE N''
        END,
    window_from_ms = DATEDIFF_BIG(MILLISECOND, '19700101', DATEADD(MINUTE, -20, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ci.log_date))),
    window_to_ms = DATEDIFF_BIG(MILLISECOND, '19700101', DATEADD(MINUTE, 20, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ci.log_date)))
FROM config.critical_issues AS ci
WHERE ci.log_date >= DATEADD(HOUR, -24, SYSDATETIME())
ORDER BY ci.log_date DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    dte.event_id,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dte.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dte.event_time),
    dte.event_class,
    dte.event_name,
    dte.spid,
    dte.database_name,
    dte.database_id,
    dte.login_name,
    dte.session_login_name,
    dte.host_name,
    dte.application_name,
    dte.server_name,
    dte.object_name,
    dte.filename,
    dte.integer_data,
    dte.integer_data_2,
    dte.text_data,
    dte.error_number,
    dte.severity,
    dte.state,
    dte.event_sequence,
    dte.is_system,
    dte.request_id,
    dte.duration_us,
    end_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), dte.end_time)
FROM collect.default_trace_events AS dte
WHERE dte.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -10, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())))
    AND dte.collection_time <= DATEADD(MINUTE, 10, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())))
    AND dte.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND dte.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY dte.event_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    x.configuration_name,
    x.value_configured,
    x.value_in_use,
    x.value_minimum,
    x.value_maximum,
    x.is_dynamic,
    x.is_advanced,
    x.description,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), x.collection_time)
FROM (
    SELECT
        sch.*,
        rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sch.configuration_id ORDER BY sch.collection_time DESC)
    FROM config.server_configuration_history AS sch
) AS x
WHERE x.rn = 1
ORDER BY x.configuration_name;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    x.database_name,
    x.setting_type,
    x.setting_name,
    x.setting_value,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), x.collection_time)
FROM (
    SELECT
        dch.*,
        rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dch.database_name, dch.setting_type, dch.setting_name ORDER BY dch.collection_time DESC)
    FROM config.database_configuration_history AS dch
) AS x
WHERE x.rn = 1
ORDER BY x.database_name, x.setting_type, x.setting_name;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    x.trace_flag,
    x.status,
    x.is_global,
    x.is_session,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), x.collection_time)
FROM (
    SELECT
        tfh.*,
        rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tfh.trace_flag ORDER BY tfh.collection_time DESC)
    FROM config.trace_flags_history AS tfh
) AS x
WHERE x.rn = 1
ORDER BY x.trace_flag;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    change_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), tfc.change_time),
    tfc.trace_flag,
    tfc.previous_status,
    tfc.new_status,
    tfc.is_global,
    tfc.is_session,
    tfc.scope,
    tfc.change_description
FROM report.trace_flag_changes AS tfc
WHERE tfc.change_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND tfc.change_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY tfc.change_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    ch.collector_name,
    ch.health_status,
    last_success_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ch.last_success_time),
    ch.hours_since_success,
    ch.failure_rate_percent,
    ch.total_runs_7d,
    ch.failed_runs_7d,
    ch.avg_duration_ms,
    ch.total_rows_collected_7d
FROM report.collection_health AS ch
ORDER BY
    CASE ch.health_status
        WHEN N'FAILING' THEN 0
        WHEN N'STALE' THEN 1
        WHEN N'WARNING' THEN 2
        WHEN N'HEALTHY' THEN 3
        WHEN N'NEVER_RUN' THEN 4
        ELSE 5
    END,
    ch.collector_name;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), cl.collection_time), metric = cl.collector_name, value = CONVERT(float, cl.duration_ms) FROM config.collection_log AS cl WHERE cl.collection_status = N'SUCCESS' AND cl.duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND cl.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND cl.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY cl.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), rj.collection_time),
    rj.job_name,
    rj.job_id,
    rj.job_enabled,
    start_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), rj.start_time),
    current_duration = rj.current_duration_formatted,
    rj.current_duration_seconds,
    avg_duration = rj.avg_duration_formatted,
    rj.avg_duration_seconds,
    p95_duration = rj.p95_duration_formatted,
    rj.p95_duration_seconds,
    rj.successful_run_count,
    rj.is_running_long,
    pct_of_avg = rj.percent_of_average,
    rj.duration_status
FROM report.running_jobs AS rj
ORDER BY
    CASE rj.duration_status
        WHEN N'LONG RUNNING' THEN 0
        WHEN N'ABOVE AVERAGE' THEN 1
        ELSE 3
    END,
    rj.current_duration_seconds DESC;
